name: converge-bridge
description: Local bridge for publishing workspace-backed deltas into the Converge prototype.

interface.shortDescription: Connect local workspace context to the Converge room.
interface.longDescription: A thin local bridge for the hackathon prototype that identifies a participant, surfaces minimal workspace context, and publishes approved deltas into the shared Converge room.
defaultPrompt: Connect Maya to the Converge room.
Publish my approved support-side constraint to the room.
